# Theme Lab — internal scaffolding for the theme v2 programme

Utilitarian helper pages to preview, play with, and validate design tokens
before they land in `../tokens.css`. **Not figures; never exported.** Serve
`dist/` over HTTP and browse to `theme_lab/…` (pages fetch co-located JSON).

Source of truth for tokens is `../../theme/registry.json` — the four
`*_data.json` chapter files here are **superseded scaffolding** kept only as
data for `ui_theme_builder.html`; decisions recorded in them were mined into
the registry on 2026-07-15. Don't update them expecting it to count.

## Pages

- **`palette_explorer.html`** — the 9 org families as 13-step OKLCH ramps
  (`--pal-*`) plus three mathematical neutrals (`--ext-*`): cool
  (navy-anchored, C 0.008), warm (orange-anchored, C 0.010), pure (C 0).
  Click a swatch to copy its `var(--pal-…)` string. Backed by
  `expanded_palette.css` + `palette_data.json`, both generated by
  `generate_palette.js` (`node generate_palette.js` from this directory —
  do not hand-edit the generated files).
- **`ui_theme_builder.html`** — renders component previews per chapter,
  fed by the `*_data.json` files; paste palette vars into `decision_value`
  fields and refresh. (Colour-stage tool; will be repointed at
  registry.json when that stage starts.)
- **`palette_tester.html`** — legacy `theme.css` styling vs. new semantic
  tags side by side; edit its `:root` block to experiment.
- **`colorspace_tester.html`** — sRGB vs HSL vs OKLCH `color-mix()`
  interpolation comparisons. Decision record: **OKLCH** is our
  interpolation space (perceptually uniform, keeps vibrance, no muddy
  sRGB dead zones).

## Naming

`--pal-{family}-{step}` = anchored in the IRPP style guide
(`../../theme/base_palette.md`). `--ext-{family}-{step}` = our additions.
Steps: 900…50 with half-steps in the light range (350/250/150/50) for
background/border resolution.
